title: The Sufi Message of Hazrat Inayat Khan: The Art of Being
author: Hazrat Inayat Khan
description: Many think that it is some deformity of the body, a curve in the spine or cavity in the brain that affects the mind. Few realize that very often the mind produces an irregularity in the spine or in the brain, thereby causing an illness. The ordinary point of view regards an illness as a physical dis
